# Onboarding: Doc Architecture Model Skill
This guide helps you design and maintain a Documentation Architecture Model (DAM).
## Quickstart Checklist
1. Read SKILL.md for DAM structure and best practices.
2. Use tools/ for doc validation (e.g. doc-lint.py, link-checker.mjs).
3. See examples/README.md for doc tree and DAM patterns.
## Troubleshooting
- **Docs fail lint?**
- Check for broken links and heading hierarchy.
## Resources
- [SKILL.md](SKILL.md)
- [examples/README.md](examples/README.md)
- [tools/](tools/)
